issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The file contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed.
Uses curl to download a file from an external source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: build-saas-landing-page
scenarios.rationale: Response A partially meets the rubric by referencing DESIGN.md and listing design elements, but it omits the required descriptions of the feature grid, pricing table, and CTA sections; Response B fails to address the rubric at all.

scenarios.name: create-notification-dropdown
scenarios.rationale: Response A references DESIGN.md variables and design elements, while Response B does not mention DESIGN.md or design system details.
